context.projectOverview: agent-bober — multi-agent orchestrator. This is the FINAL sprint of the bober-vision spec. 27 of 28 sprints completed. Task: extend bober.config.json schema with all new vision-era fields preserving back-compat parsing of existing files, add `bober config migrate` informative CLI subcommand, and wire opt-in local-only telemetry (default OFF, no network egress).

completedSprints.title: Four-mode e2e integration test
completedSprints.summary: tests/e2e/four-modes.test.ts (940 lines, 11 tests) — spec correctness gate. Real DiskCheckpointMechanism, real ExternalMcpServer subprocess, real incident lifecycle, real rollback. CI integrated.

completedSprints.title: VISION.md + docs cross-links
completedSprints.summary: Created VISION.md + COMMANDS.md, cross-linked README + AGENTS.md.

completedSprints.title: Incident state machine + CLI + integration capstone
completedSprints.summary: Full state machine for incident lifecycle.

completedSprints.title: Postmortemer agent + auto-trigger + CLI
completedSprints.summary: Auto postmortem generation on incident resolution.

context.specCompletionRitual: When all success criteria pass, the generator should ALSO update .bober/specs/spec-20260524-bober-vision.json setting status='completed' and completedAt=<ISO timestamp>, append {"event":"plan-completed","specId":"spec-20260524-bober-vision","sprintsCompleted":28,"timestamp":"..."} to .bober/history.jsonl, and update .bober/progress.md to reflect spec completion. Briefing covers this.

principles: See .bober/principles.md — read it; the briefing also covers key behavioral disciplines.
